caption:
Two premium consultancies published Q2 2026 housing-sales numbers for the same four cities within ten days of each other. The smallest gap between them is 20 percentage points; Bengaluru's is 46 (+1% vs +47%).

Neither is lying. They count different city baskets, and different definitions of a "sale" (bookings vs registrations). But if your exit decision or purchase timing rests on a headline, you should know which methodology produced it.

Three checks before you trust any market headline — in the carousel. The registered-transaction view is what we build at TERREM.

https://intel.terrem.in/markets?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=anarock-vs-propequity
